title: Metallic bat
abstract:
PURPOSE: To reduce a ball hitting sound, to easily swing a bat and to easily produce the bat by adhering the metal thin plate made of aluminium or aluminium alloy through a vibration absorbing body layer to one part, at least, on the internal surface of the hollow type metallic bat.
CONSTITUTION: The metal thin plate made of aluminium or aluminium alloy is adhered through the vibration absorbing body layer to one part, at least, on the internal surface of the hollow type metallic bat. For the metal thin plate, the thickness is 0.1-0.4mm, the length is 3-6 times to the inner diameter of the metallic bat and the thin plate is provided over 40% in a peripheral direction and adhered so as to include a ball hitting part. As the vibration absorbing body layer, there is an adhesive agent composed of a rubber or a synthetic resin, etc., as an example. For example, the aluminium plate with width 1/3 peripheral length is attached to one side of the main body in the shape of the metallic bat by a double-side tape and two plates are attached at symmetric position on the internal surface of the bat.

claims:
[Claim 1]
at least a portion of the inner surface of the hollow metal bat, the vibration absorbing layer made of aluminum or aluminum alloy sheet metal bonded via the metal bat.
[Claim 2]
claim 1 wherein, the vibration absorber layer, of rubber or synthetic resin having flexibility and tacky at room temperature in a metal bat.
[Claim 3]
1 or 2 in which said, sheet metal ball bat bat 3 times or more in the longitudinal direction of the inner part comprise a bonding range over a range, which is 40% or more in the peripheral direction of the metal bat occupies.
[Claim 4]
claim 3 in, which is divided into a plurality of sheet metal is a metal bat in circumferential direction, a plurality of divided pieces is adhered to the inner surface of the metal bat arranged at equal intervals and a metal bat.
